entry.title: New: RES25-257 (Honolulu) — CCL
entry.content:
AUTHORIZING THE USE OF OVERT VIDEO MONITORING IN THE CITY AND COUNTY OF HONOLULU TO PREVENT AND DETER GENERAL CRIMINAL ACTIVITY AND ACHIEVE THE LEGITIMATE LAW ENFORCEMENT OBJECTIVE AND LEGITIMATE PUBLIC PURPOSE OF ENSURING A SAFE AND SECURE 2025 HONOLULU MARATHON EVENT.

Latest action: Committee report and Resolution as amended were adopted.

View on the council site
